title: Contract Lifecycle & Commercial Obligations
guardrails: Packets summarize obligations, renewals, documents, tariffs, and RFQ commitments — contract renewal, legal notice, tariff publication, and supplier-document workflows stay outside silent automation.
Queue review writes audit events and AssistantActionQueueItem rows — it does not alter contracts, documents, tariffs, RFQs, or obligation records automatically.

steps: Sign in with supplier, RFQ, or tariff view access.
Open /assistant/contract-compliance (also linked as Sprint 23 in the assistant subnav).
Click Create Sprint 23 packet and confirm AssistantContractCompliancePacket persistence.
scenarios.passWhen: POST create_packet returns 201; GET snapshot lists the packet; underlying supplier docs, tariffs, and RFQ rows unchanged.

steps: Optionally add a compliance approval note.
scenarios.passWhen: Packet status REVIEW_QUEUED; audit answerKind contract_compliance_review; action queue references assistant_contract_compliance_packet.

steps: Seed or use tenant data with expiring documents or tariff validity windows.
Reload preview or create a packet.
scenarios.passWhen: Dimensional JSON reflects obligations, renewal risk, document risk, and gaps; recommendations remain human-approved.
